description_long: This object is a round, plump peach with a soft gradient of pale pink and light orange hues, giving it a fresh and ripe appearance. The surface is mostly smooth with a few subtle indentations and minor blemishes, mimicking the natural skin of a peach. Two green leaves, one larger and one smaller, are attached to a short brown stem at the top, adding a touch of realism and vibrancy. The leaves are slightly curved and have visible vein details, enhancing the organic look. The peach's coloration transitions from a deeper reddish-orange at the base to a lighter, almost white shade near the top. Overall, the object captures the delicate and inviting look of a ripe peach, suitable for placement in urban parks, markets, or street vendor scenes.
description: A round, softly colored peach with a short brown stem and two green leaves, featuring a smooth surface and subtle natural blemishes. The coloration transitions from pinkish-orange at the base to pale near the top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full roundness of the peach, both green leaves spread wide, and the stem centered at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the larger leaf overlapping the peach, with the stem and smaller leaf partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite side of the peach, both leaves visible but one appears slightly spotted.
description_view_3: Another side view with the larger leaf in the foreground, showing more of the peach's smooth surface and subtle color gradient.
